text.title: Django Service Layer Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.note: module_path not in services/, aggregate too short, public_functions empty, http_imports and orm_outside_services above zero (must be 0).

forbidden.pattern: Service module imports from django.http or rest_framework.response
View or admin file calls Model.objects.save/create/delete directly (must go through service)
Service function accepting an HttpRequest as parameter
Service module mixing two aggregates (orders and payments in one file)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Auto-format with ruff before final review.
Sort public_functions alphabetically for diff hygiene.
